1→"""Detection and processing pipeline for reconciling merged branches. 2→ 3→Detects branches whose remote tracking refs have been pruned (gone=True) 4→and whose PRs are in MERGED state. For each, runs post-merge lifecycle 5→operations: learn PR creation, objective update, and branch/worktree cleanup. 6→""" 7→ 8→from __future__ import annotations 9→ 10→import logging 11→from dataclasses import dataclass 12→from pathlib import Path 13→ 14→import click 15→ 16→from erk.cli.commands.land_cmd import _ensure_branch_not_checked_out 17→from erk.cli.commands.land_learn import _create_learn_pr_for_merged_branch 18→from erk.cli.commands.objective_helpers import ( 19→ get_objective_for_branch, 20→ run_objective_update_after_land, 21→) 22→from erk.cli.commands.wt.delete_cmd import _prune_worktrees_safe 23→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 24→from erk.core.worktree_pool import load_pool_state 25→from erk_shared.context.types import RepoContext 26→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRNotFound 27→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output 28→from erk_slots.common import find_branch_assignment 29→from erk_slots.unassign_cmd import execute_unassign 30→
... [222 lines omitted] ...
54→ error: str | None # None = success 137→ Each step is fail-open: errors on one step don't prevent the next. 154→ error: str | None = None 162→ error=None, 176→ except Exception as exc: 178→ click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + f"Learn PR failed for {info.branch}: {exc}" 192→ except Exception as exc: 194→ click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") 195→ + f"Objective update failed for {info.branch}: {exc}" 202→ except Exception as exc: 203→ error = f"Cleanup failed for {info.branch}: {exc}" 204→ user_output(click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + error) 211→ error=error,

## Summary
